title: Optimization Implementation
description: Templates of optimization mods I (and you) can use for all packs to make.
body:
All packs should have optimization included with them, these are "Template packs" I use as a basis for new ideas of packs to create, you just start with a copy of this and build from top of that.

Or else you could just add all of the mods here (to the respective version) to your pack.

In here packs will also include their client and server versions, so they can supplement each other, and for pack creation to be maximum efficient. (as referring to minimum use of mods)

Just a note: I (try to) add here only Client/Server Important mods, if some mods can be just added on the client then they won't be included here. I will maybe rethink this later.
